subject:
I create an artifact map of teamtomo.org EMPIAR-10164 dataset in
 1.6Apx
body:
I did the teamtomo.org EMPIAR-10164. After relion_reconstruct_mpi 1.6Apx 
refinement, the map was only noise. I used relion 3.0.6. The missing wedge 
affected the orientation distribution.
command:   
*mpirun -np 40 `which relion_reconstruct_mpi` --i subtomograms_1.6Apx.star 
--o reconstruction_1.6Apx.mrc --3d_rot --ctf*
[image: reconstruct_1.6A_mrc_view1.jpg][image: 
reconstruct_1.6A_mrc_view2.jpg]

*I desire that someone can help me check the whole workflow about 
EMPIAR-10164 teamtomo.org. I didn't know which step went wrong. *This 
tutorial has confused me for several months. Very very thank you.

The warp(version 1.0.9) *preprocessing settings*:
And I deselected 2 micrographs as the toturial said.
[image: 1624028532.jpg]

*To generate the .st .rawtlt*
press "create stack for imod"
[image: 1624028804(1).jpg]

*dautoalign2warp in dynamo* (I use the IMOD version : 4.12.6)
*dautoalign4warp('./imod', 1.35, 10, 85.3, './dynamo_alignments')*

*To import the aligned tilt series*
press "import"

*[image: 1624029277(1).jpg]*

*3dCTF & handness check*
I knew that the handness was very important. So I pressed the process only 
this item ctf and check the tilt handness one by one. They are all positive 
value and I never invert them.
[image: 1624029411(1).jpg]
